content: GIET UNIVERSITY,GI]NUPUR Dist: - Raya gad,a (ODISHA) No GIETU/Ph.D Dated a -Z-2_? NOTIFICATION ln accordance with Rule-11 of the U.G.C (promotion of Academic lntegrity and Prevention of Plagiarism in Higher Educational lnstitutions) Regulations - 201g, the lnstitutional Academic lntegrity Panel (lAlP) is hereby constituted, consisting of the following members. The tenure of the committee members including Chairman shall be 3 (three) years. The quorum for the meetings shall be 3 out of 4 members (including Chairman) Functions of lAlP:- 1. The lAlP shall consider the recommendation of DAlp. 2. The lAlP shall also investigate cases of plagiarism as per the provisions mentioned in the U.G.C regulations 3. The lAlP shall follow the principles of natural Justice while deciding about the allegation of plagiarism against the students, faculties, researchers and staff of the University. 4' The lAlP shall have the power to review the recommendations of DAlp including penalties with due justification. 5' The lAlP shall send the report after investigation and the recommendation on penalties to be imposed to the Registrar with in a period of 45 days from the date of receipt of recommendation of DAIP/ComplainUinitiation of the proceedings. 6. The lAlP shall provide a copy of the report to the person (s) against whom inquiry report is submitted through proper channel.
